title: Junior Executive, Procurement
description:
About The Role:

Are you an organized and detail-oriented individual passionate about demand planning, purchasing, and supply chain management? We are looking for a Junior Executive to join our dynamic team in our Singapore Headquarter and play a key role in ensuring the smooth operation of our inventory and shipping processes across Australia, New Zealand, and the Netherlands. If you have no experience but have a can-do attitude and a willingness to learn, you already tick the main boxes and we would like to meet you.

Key Responsibilities:

Demand Planning & Purchasing

  • Administer orders, contracts, and shipping documents to ensure accurate delivery of goods to their destinations on time.
  • Communicate inventory issues or price change requests to the procurement manager in a timely manner.
  • Report any anomalies, such as supplier issues, vessel booking delays, or unexpected stock movement.
  • Coordinate with suppliers and shipping agents to ensure smooth shipments and timely issue resolution.
  • Monitor and replenish inventory levels for regional warehouses (Australia, New Zealand, Netherlands, and assigned markets).
  • Analyse weekly inventory reports and take proactive steps to address short stock or overstock situations.
  • Create and analyse procurement data reports as required by the procurement manager when needed.

About You:

You are someone with

  • Strong English proficiency in both writing and speaking, enabling clear communication with global stakeholders.
  • Familiar with incoterm
  • Strong computer skills will be a plus.
  • Ability to multitask, highly organise and able to meet deadline
  • A proactive approach to problem-solving and process improvement.
  • The ability to work collaboratively in a fast-paced environment.

We are expanding and looking for a talented individual to join our Procurement Team as a new headcount.

We regret to inform that only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

postedCompany.description:
Since our humble beginning as a grocery shop in Australia in the 1970s, it has always been our mission to bring authentic Asian foods to new frontiers.


As subsidiary of China Merchants Hoi Tung (The only comprehensive business platform under China Merchants Group) since 1990, Oriental Merchant has expanded its operation to encompass wholesale, distribution and the marketing of authentic Asian groceries.


Today, with over 30 years of development, Oriental Merchant has established companies in Australia, New Zealand, the Netherlands, the United Kingdom, Canada, Japan and Singapore, we employ approximately 500 people across our operations globally.


Food is about people, and it brings us together. Oriental Merchant is always on the lookout for enthusiastic and talented individuals who want to share the wonders and flavours of authentic Asian food to the world. With a global presence, our multinational team brings new cultures and ideas from around the world that enable us to adapt to any new challenges.
postedCompany.name: ORIENTAL MERCHANT HOLDINGS PTE. LTD.
